summary: Scenario Analysis Module fully tested. Fixed 3 backend bugs (route ordering, UUID parsing, Decimal type errors). All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend tabs verified: Dashboard, Builder, Sensitivity, What-If, Compare. All features working correctly with proper results display.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering conflict in server.py - scenario_analysis routes must be included BEFORE scenarios router to avoid /{scenario_id} catch-all pattern
Fixed /properties route placement in scenario_analysis.py - must be defined before /{scenario_id} route
Fixed ScenarioModification.new_value type to Union[float, str] to support CERTIFICATION and CLIMATE modification types
Fixed Decimal division error in compare_scenarios by converting to float before division
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scenario Analysis Module fully implemented and tested. Uses SAMPLE/HARDCODED property data (not from real DB) - this is intentional per design. The module has 5 tabs: Dashboard, Builder, Sensitivity, What-If, Compare. All APIs working correctly. Frontend URL: /scenario-analysis accessible from sidebar.
passed_tests: Scenario Analysis page loads at /scenario-analysis route
Dashboard tab: Shows KPI cards (Scenarios Created, Analyses Run, Avg Value Swing ±18.5%, Top Variable: Cap Rate)
Dashboard tab: Shows Most Impactful Variables (Cap Rate, Rent Growth, Vacancy Rate)
Dashboard tab: Shows Recent Scenarios with value changes
Builder tab: Property select dropdown works correctly
Builder tab: Scenario name input works
Builder tab: Build Scenario button works - shows Base Value, Adjusted Value, Change %, Impact Breakdown
Builder tab: Quick Templates (4 templates: Optimistic Growth, Recession Stress Test, Green Building Upgrade, Rising Interest Rates)
Sensitivity tab: Property select dropdown works
Sensitivity tab: Variable checkboxes (Cap Rate, Rent Growth, Vacancy Rate) work
Sensitivity tab: Min/Max range inputs work
Sensitivity tab: Quick Presets (Standard Analysis, DCF Focus, Operating Performance)
Sensitivity tab: Run Sensitivity Analysis button works
Sensitivity tab: Tornado Chart displays correctly
Sensitivity tab: Spider Chart displays correctly with Base Case, Optimistic, Pessimistic scenarios
What-If tab: Property select dropdown works
What-If tab: Cascade Effects toggle works
What-If tab: Change type dropdown (Percentage/Absolute) works
What-If tab: Analyze Impact button works
What-If tab: Results show Base Value → Adjusted Value with change %
What-If tab: Change Breakdown shows parameter impacts
Compare tab: Property select dropdown works
Compare tab: Scenario selection checkboxes work
Compare tab: Compare Scenarios button works
Compare tab: Comparison Summary shows Best/Worst Scenario
Compare tab: Key Differentiators (Value spread, Cap rate range) display
Compare tab: Value Comparison bar chart works
Compare tab: Detailed Comparison table shows all scenarios with Value, Change, Cap Rate

mocked_apis_list: get_sample_properties() - returns 3 sample properties (hardcoded with valid UUIDs)
_scenarios_store (in-memory) - scenarios stored in memory, not persisted to DB
Note: Sample data is intentional per design - all calculation engines are real

dashboard.recent_scenarios: Shows last 5 scenarios with name, description, value change %

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering conflict - old scenarios router with /{scenario_id} catch-all was included before new scenario_analysis router
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved scenario_analysis router include BEFORE scenarios_router in server.py

bugs_fixed.root_cause: /properties route defined after /{scenario_id} route in scenario_analysis.py
ScenarioModification.new_value typed as float, but CERTIFICATION type needed string 'LEED Gold'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed new_value type to Union[float, str] in schema

bugs_fixed.root_cause: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for /: 'decimal.Decimal' and 'float'
bugs_fixed.fix: Converted Decimal to float before division: float(value_spread)/1e6

bugs_fixed.issue: Property IDs returning 422 UUID parsing errors
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Sample properties used string IDs like 'prop-001' but schemas expected UUID
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed sample property IDs to valid UUIDs (00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000x)
